## 🗨️ Topic

What would you like to discuss?

## 📋 Context

Provide context and background for the discussion.

## 🎯 Questions

What specific questions do you have?

## 🔗 Related Issues

Are there any related issues or pull requests?

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I searched for existing discussions
- [ ] This is constructive and in good faith
- [ ] I included clear context and questions
